parameters.query: UPDATE leads SET nurture_enrolled_at = now(), updated_at = now() WHERE email = '{{ $json.email }}' AND nurture_enrolled_at IS NULL
SELECT email_opt_out FROM leads WHERE LOWER(email) = LOWER('{{ $('Prep Fields').item.json.email }}') LIMIT 1

SELECT l.status, l.id AS lead_id FROM leads l JOIN clients c ON l.client_id = c.id WHERE l.email = '{{ $('Prep Fields').first().json.email }}' AND c.primary_contact_email = '{{ $('Prep Fields').first().json.agent_email }}' LIMIT 1

assignments.name: prompt

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { personalizations: [{ to: [{ email: $json.email }], subject: $json.subject }], from: { email: 'hello@norrai.co', name: $json.agent_name }, content: [{ type: 'text/html', value: $json.html_body }], tracking_settings: { click_tracking: { enable: false } } } }}
